Compliance.description: CMS registered #1512; strong solvency 38.6%; AA+ rating; under CMS s44 forensic investigation for governance/procurement (ongoing 2026 court case with Medscheme), no penalties yet but raises concerns.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Low ratings: HelloPeter 1.73/5 (Trust Index 4.2), app reviews highlight frustrations despite some positive care stories.

Product Value.description: Competitive pricing across spectrum, good value in hospital/chronic cover, network savings; some plans loss-making but reserves support.

Innovation.description: Member app with virtual consults, chat, digital card, wellness tools, authorizations; care programs for chronic/cancer; digital health initiatives.

Customer Support.description: App chat 8am-8pm Mon-Fri/Sat; phone support; mixed reviews - quick claims praised but frequent complaints on delays/responsiveness.

Accessibility & Security.description: POPIA compliant with dedicated policy and consent processes; app with digital access but poor usability reports; no known breaches; encrypted data practices in app.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: From R1,275/mo (BonCore hospital) to R12,509/mo (BonComprehensive); child rates ~R800-R2500

socialSentiment.summary: Mixed; positive on financial strength/pricing, negative on service/app from HelloPeter/Google; news focuses on governance disputes.
